documentation.description: This package contains functions for runtime operations on boolean arrays

array_types.name: Boolean_Array
array_types.code: type Boolean_Array is array (Integer range <>) of Boolean;

generic_instantiations.name: Vector_And
generic_instantiations.code: procedure Vector_And is new Binary_Operation ("and", System.Vectors."and");

generic_instantiations.name: Vector_Nand
generic_instantiations.code:
procedure Vector_Nand is
   new Binary_Operation (Boolean_Operations.Nand, Boolean_Operations.Nand);

generic_instantiations.name: Vector_Nor
generic_instantiations.code:
procedure Vector_Nor is
   new Binary_Operation (Boolean_Operations.Nor, Boolean_Operations.Nor);

generic_instantiations.name: Vector_Not
generic_instantiations.code:
procedure Vector_Not is
   new Unary_Operation ("not", Boolean_Operations."not");

generic_instantiations.name: Vector_Nxor
generic_instantiations.code:
procedure Vector_Nxor is
   new Binary_Operation (Boolean_Operations.Nxor, Boolean_Operations.Nxor);

generic_instantiations.name: Vector_Operations
generic_instantiations.code:
package Vector_Operations is
   new Generic_Vector_Operations (Boolean, Integer, Boolean_Array);

generic_instantiations.name: Vector_Or
generic_instantiations.code: procedure Vector_Or is new Binary_Operation ("or", System.Vectors."or");

generic_instantiations.name: Vector_Xor
generic_instantiations.code: procedure Vector_Xor is new Binary_Operation ("xor", System.Vectors."xor");
